items.title: Connected practice, current month, no GSC rows yet → "Google data is still pending" + tooltip
items.precondition: Logged in as an org whose website project has an ACTIVE gsc integration but zero gsc_data rows for the current month (any connected org in the first ~2 days of a month, e.g. Garrison on July 1–2).
steps: 2. Confirm the pipeline shows the current month (e.g. "· JULY 2026")
3. Look at the Google Visibility card's empty state
4. Hover the small ? icon next to the message
items.expected: Card reads "Google data is still pending" (NOT "Not connected yet") with a ? icon whose hover tooltip reads "GSC data trails ~2 days behind".
items.evidence: Owner-verified in own browser tab, 2026-07-02 (QA approval: "looks good now")

items.title: Org without an active GSC integration still shows "Not connected yet"
items.precondition: Logged in as an org whose website project has NO website_integrations row with platform=gsc status=active.
steps: 2. Look at the Google Visibility card's empty state
items.expected: Card reads "Not connected yet" with no ? icon — unchanged legacy behavior.
items.evidence: Owner-verified in own browser tab, 2026-07-02 (QA approval: "looks good now")

items.title: Past month, connected, zero rows → "No Google data for this month"
items.precondition: Same org as T1. A past month within the last 12 that has no gsc_data rows (e.g. a month before the GSC connection date).
steps: 2. Click the ‹ chevron until a connected-but-empty past month is shown
3. Look at the Google Visibility card's empty state
items.expected: Card reads "No Google data for this month" — not "pending", not "Not connected yet".
items.evidence: Owner-verified in own browser tab, 2026-07-02 (QA approval: "looks good now")
items.notes: If every past month has GSC rows, this state is unreachable for that org — pick an org that connected GSC recently.

items.title: Month chevrons: step back 12 months, clamp both ends, no skeleton flash
items.precondition: Logged in on /patientJourneyInsights, any org with funnel data.
steps: 1. Confirm the › (next) chevron is disabled on the current month
2. Click ‹ once — the period label moves to last month and the funnel numbers change to that month's window
3. While the step loads, confirm the previous funnel stays visible (dimmed), not a full-page skeleton
4. Keep clicking ‹ until it disables — exactly 11 steps back (12 months shown incl. current)
5. Click › back to the current month — it disables again at the current month
items.expected: Both clamps hold; each month shows its own numbers and period label; stepping dims briefly instead of flashing the loading skeleton; an open stage popover closes on month change.
items.evidence: Owner-verified in own browser tab, 2026-07-02 (QA approval: "looks good now")

items.title: Advisor banner copy is month-aware
items.precondition: Org where the visits→leads conversion has a value (banner shows the % sentence).
steps: 1. On the current month, read the advisor banner
2. Step to a past month with lead data and read it again
items.expected: Current month ends "…contacted your practice this month."; past month ends "…contacted your practice in {Month Year}." (e.g. "in June 2026.").
items.evidence: Owner-verified in own browser tab, 2026-07-02 (QA approval: "looks good now")

items.title: Practice Hub journey card unaffected (stays current month)
items.precondition: Same session as T4, after stepping to a past month on the insights screen.
steps: 2. Look at the Patient Journey summary card
items.expected: Hub card still shows current-month numbers and headline; no errors; clicking it opens the insights screen (which lands on the current month after a location switch or fresh mount).
items.evidence: Owner-verified in own browser tab, 2026-07-02 (QA approval: "looks good now")
